_comment: Tests Village Remedies' mandatory location gate before all confirm_service calls, VARIANT-FIRST for Acupuncture new/existing, and silent direct route for Massage (no gate, only location gate).

scenarios.name: Acupuncture — must ask new/existing gate before location gate

history.content: I'd like to book an acupuncture appointment.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent asks the new/existing gate question ('Have you had acupuncture with us before?') as a spoken-only turn. FAIL if agent asks location first, routes directly, or skips the gate question.

scenarios.name: Acupuncture returning — location gate fires after gate, silent confirm_service after location

history.content: I'd like to book an acupuncture appointment.
Have you had acupuncture with us before?
Which of our locations would you like to visit? We have Balmain, Lane Cove, or Marrickville.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent calls universal_router intent='confirm_service' silently with appointment_type='Acupuncture (Follow up)', patient_status='existing', business_name='Balmain', and business_id='1717010852512540252'. FAIL if agent speaks any text before the tool call, or uses wrong appointment type or wrong business ID.

scenarios.name: Massage — no new/existing gate, but location gate is mandatory

history.content: I'd like to book a massage.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent asks the location question ('Which of our locations would you like to visit? We have Balmain, Lane Cove, or Marrickville.') without first asking a new/existing gate. FAIL if agent asks 'Have you been before?' or routes to confirm_service without asking location.
